A Readiness System Built For Real Life.

CCC helps users turn sleep, hydration, digestion, stress, recovery, and energy into a daily readiness score, a recommended mode, and simple next actions.

CCC Product Preview
Daily score + guided decisions

What Early Users Are Saying

Built for real life, real schedules, and real results.

“This helped me stop guessing. I know when to push and when to recover.”

— Beta User

“The daily score keeps me honest. I actually use it every morning.”

— Founder Access Member

“Feels like a performance dashboard instead of another fitness app.”

Stop Guessing With Your Body.

Know when to push. Know when to recover. Know what actually helps.

60 sec Daily check-in
5 Operating modes
1 place Signals + trends
Beta Founding access

What CCC Actually Does

CCC is not just another tracker. It is a decision system.

1

Collects Daily Signals

Track sleep, hydration, digestion, mood, soreness, recovery, stress, and energy.

2

Creates A Readiness Score

CCC turns those inputs into a daily score so users know where they really stand.

3

Guides The Next Move

Users get a recommended mode and practical next actions instead of more confusion.

Why People Need This

Most people know something feels off. They just do not know which signal matters most.

Common problems CCC helps solve
  • Low energy without clear reason
  • Inconsistent workouts and recovery
  • Poor sleep wrecking momentum
  • Guessing what food or habits help
  • Feeling off without knowing why

How The Product Works

Simple enough to use daily. Powerful enough to change behavior.

1

Step 1 · Log Signals

Users check in quickly with sleep, hydration, digestion, soreness, mood, and energy.

2

Step 2 · See Score + Mode

CCC calculates readiness and recommends focus, workout, recovery, travel, or reset.

3

Step 3 · Act Smarter

Users see what is helping, what is hurting, and what to do next.

Choose Your Mode

CCC is built around real-life operating modes.

Focus Mode

Protect attention and execute at a high level.

Deep Work

Workout Mode

Train when the body is ready to produce.

Train Smart

Recovery Mode

Reset when recovery has become the priority.

Recover Better

Travel Mode

Keep consistency when schedules and locations change.

Stay Ready

Damage Control

Bounce back quickly after rough sleep or off-plan days.

Reset Fast

What Users See Inside

The product is designed to reduce noise and make daily action easier.

Inside the product
  • Readiness score
  • Signal breakdown
  • Mode recommendation
  • Trend graphs
  • Top insight for the day
  • Simple action list
Score Trends Signals Actions

What Makes CCC Different

Most tools collect data. CCC helps users do something useful with it.

Built For Daily Use

Fast enough to use in under a minute.

Built Around Decisions

The goal is not more tracking. The goal is better decisions.

Built For Real Life

Work, travel, training, bad sleep, and imperfect schedules are all part of the system.

Start free now. Upgrade later when you're ready.

  • Readiness Score
